content: Imperial Soldier: Gods, this fuckin’ sun’s hotter than a whore’s thighs after a round of mead. How the hell are you still standing in that skimpy shit, sister? Imperial Soldier 2: Pfft, like you got any room to talk, you’re prancin’ around in less than a Solitude brothel girl. At least my tits don’t flop out with every damn step like yours. Imperial Soldier: Ha! You wish they did.
